rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they refer to visible ports, and in implementation annexes for subcomponent bindings.
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model scope in AGREE contracts.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be syntactically valid and use types consistent with the AADL model.
Assumptions and guarantees should relate visible inputs to outputs or enforce type-safe expressions.
Avoid referencing implementation-only subcomponents or ports in component type contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Constants and equations must use valid scalar types: int, real, bool.
Helper functions and data types must be defined or imported in the model.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes unless they are valid outputs or assignments.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the analyzed model.
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
